description: The company releases a new 'Advanced Analytics' module. An Account Manager contacts existing customers to sell them the new add-on.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of customers who would be good candidates for the new module based on their usage patterns.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a target list of customers who frequently use the standard reporting features.

nodes.task_description: Contact a target customer and demonstrate the new 'Advanced Analytics' module.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent effectively shows the value of the new module.

nodes.task_description: Process the order to add the new module to the customer's existing subscription.
